title: 華拉堤在賽後接受訪問

replies.msg:
'With Cavani's goal, we gained some peace,' Verratti told L'Equipe. 'I then spoke to the players of the Barca, they told me that it was finished.

'Take three goals in seven minutes, I cannot find an explanation, it's football.

'This is a game I will never forget. I hope it will serve as a lesson to everyone.'

'We must find the strength to raise our heads. You have to be men. We are all sad. We lost 6-1, it's not because of the referee. We are primarily responsible.'

巴黎聖日耳門中場華拉堤在賽後接受訪問時表示：

「當卡雲尼射成1：3時，我們也認為大局已定了。那時侯我和兩、三個巴塞球員傾計，他們也認為球賽已經完結的」

「巴塞可以在7分鐘內攻入3球，我不能為此找任何籍口或解釋，這就是足球」

「這場比賽我永遠也不會忘記，我希望這場比賽會成為一本「反勝」教科書去令更多人知道這一個難忘的晚上」

「巴塞是值得晉級的，他們很難應付，我們不能作出有效傳球。尤其是上半場他們的逼搶十分強勁─雖然我們在下半場重新奪回不少機會」

「雖然我們都很傷心，但我們要像男子漢一樣認輸，我們大敗1：6不是出於球証的問題」

PSG HAD THEMSELVES AND REFEREE TO BLAME FOR CAMP NOU COLLAPSE, SAYS EMERY

by Goal.com

"We have only shown our personality at times, but the refereeing with two penalties for them and the penalty not given to us has had an impact," he said.

"And then Barcelona also had the crowd dragging them home. This makes the most in-depth analysis difficult. We believed we could do it, but the referee's decisions penalised us."
